ai_grading_requests_lifecycle_check.name: ai_grading_requests_lifecycle_check
ai_grading_requests_lifecycle_check.value: ("ai_grading_requests"."status" = 'in_progress' and "ai_grading_requests"."completed_at" is null and "ai_grading_requests"."submission_id" is null) or ("ai_grading_requests"."status" = 'completed' and "ai_grading_requests"."completed_at" is not null and "ai_grading_requests"."submission_id" is not null) or ("ai_grading_requests"."status" = 'failed' and "ai_grading_requests"."completed_at" is not null)

chat_states_claim_check.name: chat_states_claim_check
chat_states_claim_check.value: ("chat_states"."claim_id" is null and "chat_states"."claim_started_at" is null) or ("chat_states"."claim_id" is not null and "chat_states"."claim_started_at" is not null)

mistake_states_lifecycle_check.name: mistake_states_lifecycle_check
mistake_states_lifecycle_check.value: ("mistake_states"."wrong_count" = 0 and "mistake_states"."last_wrong_at" is null and "mistake_states"."cleared_at" is not null) or ("mistake_states"."wrong_count" >= 1 and "mistake_states"."last_wrong_at" is not null)

mock_exam_attempts_progress_check.name: mock_exam_attempts_progress_check
mock_exam_attempts_progress_check.value: "mock_exam_attempts"."current_section_index" >= 0 and "mock_exam_attempts"."total_questions" > 0 and ("mock_exam_attempts"."raw_score" is null or "mock_exam_attempts"."raw_score" between 0 and "mock_exam_attempts"."total_questions")

mock_exam_attempts_lifecycle_check.name: mock_exam_attempts_lifecycle_check
mock_exam_attempts_lifecycle_check.value: ("mock_exam_attempts"."status" = 'in_progress' and "mock_exam_attempts"."completed_at" is null and "mock_exam_attempts"."abandoned_at" is null) or ("mock_exam_attempts"."status" = 'completed' and "mock_exam_attempts"."completed_at" is not null and "mock_exam_attempts"."abandoned_at" is null) or ("mock_exam_attempts"."status" = 'abandoned' and "mock_exam_attempts"."abandoned_at" is not null)

speaking_submissions_feedback_check.name: speaking_submissions_feedback_check
speaking_submissions_feedback_check.value: "speaking_submissions"."status" <> 'ai_scored' or ("speaking_submissions"."feedback" is not null and "speaking_submissions"."model" is not null)

vocab_quiz_sessions_source_check.name: vocab_quiz_sessions_source_check
vocab_quiz_sessions_source_check.value: ("vocab_quiz_sessions"."purpose" = 'practice' and "vocab_quiz_sessions"."source_word_id" is null and "vocab_quiz_sessions"."source_mistake_at" is null) or ("vocab_quiz_sessions"."purpose" = 'mistake_retest' and "vocab_quiz_sessions"."source_word_id" is not null and "vocab_quiz_sessions"."source_mistake_at" is not null)

writing_submissions_feedback_check.name: writing_submissions_feedback_check
writing_submissions_feedback_check.value: "writing_submissions"."status" <> 'ai_scored' or ("writing_submissions"."feedback" is not null and "writing_submissions"."model" is not null)
